seoTitle: Double Bay vs Douglas Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Double Bay and Douglas Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Double Bay vs Douglas Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Double Bay and Douglas Park.
heading: Double Bay vs Douglas Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Double Bay, New South Wales and Douglas Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Douglas Park has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Double Bay (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Double Bay or Douglas Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Double Bay has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Douglas Park scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Double Bay scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Douglas Park scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Double Bay or Douglas Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Douglas Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
